title: miliusa roxburghiana
intro: Miliusa roxburghiana, also known as Roxburgh's Miliusa, is a plant species native to the Himalayas and parts of the Indian subcontinent. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Miliusa roxburghiana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an anti-cancer agent. Herbal preparations of Miliusa roxburghiana are often made into decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
